title: Better Shield Sounds
description: Better Shield Stun Sounds For PvP!
body:
# Better Shield Sounds

**A Texture Pack That Makes Shield Stun Sound More Alerting And Different From Item Break Sound, Helping You In PvP!**

![Better Shield Sounds Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8ace2f997cd36e50da61465c00cedf19f4067e3.png)

# About The Pack
This texture pack aims to improve the shield stun/break sound to make it more alerting and differentiate it from the item break sound, thus helping you in pvp or any other use case.

DM me on discord if there are any issues with the pack, my username is hunterleviathan

THANK YOU FOR 15K DOWNLOADS! i did not expect this pack to get that many downloads ngl!

# Credits
- Logo idea by Stilt34
